no: Dualadins by AvA (DataForInfinity). Enables paladin dual-classing to cleric by implementing the Paladin as a Ranger kit internally. Includes item access fixes, alignment adjustments, and NPC support (Keldorn). tp2 renamed to SCI-Dualadins in v2.1. Install after class/kit mods and item overhauls (ZSTweaks, etc.) since it patches item usability flags. Install before proficiency overhauls.

passive.desc: Aura of Protection from Evil 10' radius
Turn Undead as a cleric 2 levels lower

restrictions.items: Implemented as ranger kit internally to enable dual-classing to Cleric. Same abilities as vanilla Paladin.

hlaPool.note: Standard paladin HLA pool (implemented as ranger kit internally)

spellRestrictions.note: Standard paladin spellcasting. Enables dual-class to Cleric.

passive.desc: Immune to fear, charm, and poison

activated.effects: Removes fear from allies in area.

restrictions.items: Cavalier abilities via ranger base class. Enables dual-class to Cleric.

statBonus.note: LG only. Cavalier bonuses vs fiends/dragons.

passive.desc: Dispel Magic cast at 2x character level

activated.effects: See through invisibility and illusions for 1 round/level.

restrictions.items: Inquisitor abilities via ranger base class. Enables dual-class to Cleric.

spellRestrictions.note: Inquisitors cannot cast priest spells at all.

statBonus.note: LG only. No Lay on Hands.

passive.desc: Immune to hold and level drain

restrictions.items: Undead Hunter abilities via ranger base class. Enables dual-class to Cleric.

statBonus.note: LG only. No Lay on Hands. +3 vs undead.

activated.effects: Drain 2 HP/level from target, heal self.

restrictions.items: Blackguard abilities via ranger base class. Enables dual-class to Cleric.

new: Paladin variant enabling dual-classing to Cleric while retaining paladin abilities.
Cavalier variant enabling dual-classing to Cleric.
Inquisitor variant enabling dual-classing to Cleric.
Undead Hunter variant enabling dual-classing to Cleric.
Blackguard variant enabling dual-classing to Cleric.

sum: Enables paladin dual-classing to cleric by implementing the Paladin as a Ranger kit internally. Includes Blackguard, Keldorn support, item access fixes, and alignment adjustments.

co.n: Base-class Paladin can dual-class to Cleric
co.no: Core component. Adds a level 2 ability for base Paladin to dual-class to Cleric. Implemented as a Ranger kit internally — the Paladin/Cleric is technically a kitted Ranger/Cleric. Required by most other components.
co.tp2n: Base-class Paladin can dual-class to Cleric

co.n: All standard Paladin kits can dual-class to Cleric
co.no: Extends dual-class ability to Cavalier, Inquisitor, and Undead Hunter kits. Generates warnings about kit installations — safe to ignore per author.
co.tp2n: All standard Paladin kits can dual-class to Cleric

co.n: The EE Blackguard can dual-class to Cleric
co.no: Enables Blackguard to dual-class to Cleric. Try with Helmet of Opposite Alignment for interesting dialogue.
co.tp2n: The EE Blackguard can dual-class to Cleric

co.n: Enable NPC Paladin to acquire 17 Wisdom for dual-classing: Keldorn
co.no: Keldorn gains 17 WIS via personal quest resolution, enabling dual-class to Cleric. Inquisitor/Cleric can cast level 7 spells and turn undead.
co.tp2n: Enable NPC Paladin to acquire 17 Wisdom for dual-classing: Keldorn

co.n: Enable Paladin/Cleric to use all Paladin items
co.no: After Paladin class reactivation, allows equipping all Paladin-specific items and weapons. Scans all .itm files. May be considered unbalanced since Clerics normally can't use swords.
co.tp2n: Enable Paladin/Cleric to use all Paladin items

co.n: Limit Paladin/Cleric to only use Paladin weapons not restricted by the Cleric multiclass proficiencies
co.no: Refinement of cn:300. Re-bans Paladin weapons that Ranger/Clerics can't use by proficiency rules (e.g. Carsomyr). Detects current proficiency ruleset.
co.tp2n: Limit Paladin/Cleric to only use Paladin weapons not restricted by the Cleric multiclass proficiencies

co.n: Restrict Ranger/Cleric to use Paladin items by enforcing lawful good alignment on good Paladin items
co.no: Adds lawful good alignment requirement to Paladin holy items. Prevents evil-aligned characters from using items like Carsomyr.
co.tp2n: Restrict Ranger/Cleric to use Paladin items by enforcing lawful good alignment on good Paladin items

co.n: Prevent Paladin/Cleric and Ranger/Cleric to use opposite class items by banning lawful alignment for all Rangers and their items
co.no: CONTROVERSIAL: Removes lawful good alignment option for ALL Rangers. Prevents cross-class item abuse but affects all Ranger characters, not just Paladin duals.
co.tp2n: Prevent Paladin/Cleric and Ranger/Cleric to use opposite class items by banning lawful as well as evil alignment for all Rangers and their items

co.n: Allow true neutral alignment for all Rangers to compensate loss of lawful good alignment
co.no: Compensates cn:450's alignment restriction by adding True Neutral as a valid Ranger alignment. Fits the grim Beastmaster/Stalker archetype.
co.tp2n: Allow true neutral alignment for all Rangers to compensate loss of lawful good alignment

co.n: Prevent Paladin/Cleric to get recognized as a Ranger after Paladin class reactivation
co.no: Recommended. Stops NPCs from addressing your Paladin/Cleric as a Ranger (e.g. Umar Hills cabin offer). Detects which dual-class kits are installed.
co.tp2n: Prevent Paladin/Cleric to get recognized as a Ranger after Paladin class reactivation

co.n: Allow Paladin/Cleric to get recognized as a Paladin after dual-class reactivation
co.no: Upon Paladin class reactivation, the character is recognized as both Cleric and Paladin by the game world. Author notes this is technically unnecessary but more immersive.
